title: ElytraAutopilot
description: A mod able to automatically fly your elytra, both to a destination or endlessly in a direction. It is also capable of flying forever without using fireworks. AKA ElytraPilot.
body:
**A mod able to automatically fly your elytra both to a destination or endlessly in a direction. It is also able to fly forever without using fireworks using a glitch that allows you to gain height by flying down then up at specific angles. Below is a list of commands:**

---

### `/elytrapilot destination`
Set a flight destination. ElytraPilot will attempt to fly you to this destination whenever it is active.

### `/elytrapilot destination none`
Clear the current destination. ElytraPilot will fly you in the direction you are looking.

### `/elytrapilot fireworkUsage`
Configure how fireworks are used:
- `none`: Never uses fireworks, and lands when obstructed.
- `whenStuck`: Only uses fireworks when stuck.

### `/elytrapilot overlayLocation`
Set where the flight overlay appears.

### `/elytrapilot flightUpdates`
Control how often ElytraPilot sends flight updates:
- `none`: No updates.
- `minimal`: Important updates only (e.g., landing).
- `all`: All available updates.

### `/elytrapilot displayOverlay`
Toggle the flight overlay display.

### `/elytrapilot blockGain`
Toggle whether ElytraPilot should gradually gain height or stay at the same height when flying.

### `/elytrapilot bind record`
Record a new keybind that toggles ElytraPilot on and off when flying.

### `/elytrapilot bind remove`
Remove any currently set keybind.
